description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU-CPU Nightly Build that runs on a schedule and can be triggered manually or on push and pull request events to the main branch. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build and test on Linux with different Python versions, and uploads the built wheel as a GitHub Actions artifact. It also installs and tests the FBGEMM_GPU package and pushes the binary to PyPI if the workflow is not triggered by a pull request or push event.
